text: hey, quick question - do you guys have any promo codes or discounts rn? my friend said there were some but idk how to find them.
I tried to upload a file, but it just stops at 75%. It's weird, can you help?
The app won't open after the latest update. Can you help?

I am experiencing an unusual issue with my device, as it seems to be malfunctioning sporadically. While I understand that these matters can sometimes be complex, I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this matter efficiently. Additionally, could you confirm if the problem is likely related to the recent software update I installed? Thank you for your assistance.
I'm having trouble accessing my files. They won't open, and I didn't change anything.

My app crashes all the time!! Like, it freezes, and then, I don’t know if it’s my phone or the app, but the screen goes black. I tried restarting but it’s still black, also my phone is new, bought it last month, just saying. What’s going on? Help!

I am writing to express my sincere concerns regarding my recent experience with your subscription service. I had explicitly canceled my subscription last month because of some unforeseen circumstances, yet I have just noticed that my account was charged for the upcoming period. This seems to be a misunderstanding on your end. I would appreciate it if you could look into this matter urgently and process a refund for the erroneous charge. Thank you for your attention to this matter, and I hope to resolve this at your earliest convenience.
My app crashes every time I try to open it. Also, I have a cat that likes to sit on my keyboard. Can you help?

I would like to bring to your attention an issue with my account. Although I was informed that my subscription was successfully processed, I am currently unable to access premium features. This situation is quite perplexing as I had received a confirmation email. Could you please clarify why this discrepancy exists?

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to discuss an issue that has caused me significant frustration regarding a recent order I placed. While I completely understand that delays can happen, I was quite surprised to find that my refund request, which I submitted over two weeks ago due to receiving the wrong product, has not yet been processed. In the meantime, I have been receiving numerous emails from your marketing team, promoting various other products, which I find somewhat ironic given my current predicament. I would greatly appreciate any assistance you could offer to expedite the resolution of my refund request, as I really need the funds to purchase another item without further delay. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
I'm experiencing frequent crashes on the app, and I can't seem to figure out what's causing it. Can you help?
Hey, I ordered a phone case like a week ago and it still hasn’t shown up. Was supposed to arrive by now, right? Can you check on that for me? I’m kinda worried it got lost or something.

To whom it may concern, I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase that did not meet the expectations outlined in the product description. I had expected a higher quality than what was delivered. Kindly let me know the procedure to initiate this refund, as well as any necessary documentation I am required to provide. Thank you for your assistance.

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my concern regarding a persistent technical issue I have been facing with your application. Specifically, every time I attempt to access the settings menu, the app crashes unexpectedly, which has been quite frustrating. I've tried several troubleshooting steps, including reinstalling the application multiple times and clearing the cache, yet the problem persists. Additionally, I am using the latest version of the app on my device, which is running the most recent operating system. Your assistance in resolving this matter would be greatly appreciated, as I rely heavily on this application for my daily tasks.

I’m not sure if it’s just me or if there’s something wrong with my account. I can log in, but when I try to access my subscription details, it seems like the page is showing different information than what I recall. It feels confusing, almost like the system is telling me that I’m both on a trial and a paid plan at the same time. Can someone clarify what’s really happening? It’s quite perplexing, and I would really appreciate some assistance in navigating this situation since I keep receiving mixed messages.
I changed my email but I can still get my verification codes to my old email. What's going on?
